title: Malaysian Fried Rice
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish that combines the best of both worlds from Malaysian and Chinese cuisine. Quick, easy, and delicious!
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the charred vegetables and cook until tender.
Push the vegetables to one side of the pan.
Add 2 tablespoons of oil to the empty side of the pan.
Pour in 2 cups of xenial rice and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add the sweetcorn, fried shallots, and stir-fry for another 2 minutes.
Combine the rice mixture with the charred vegetables.
Stir-fry for a final 2 minutes until everything is well combined.
Serve hot and garnish with fresh herbs if desired.
